name: Perception / UserTesting Recorder
description: Screen and audio recorder for UserTesting.com research sessions (formerly branded as Perception by UserZoom/Boltmade)

download.note: Mac App Store exclusive. Bundle ID: com.usertesting.recorder.UserTesting-Recorder-Extension

notes: Perception was the original branding (by UserZoom/Boltmade). UserTesting acquired it and renamed to 'UserTesting Recorder Extension.' Login required to access from the dashboard at app.usertesting.com. Help center at help.usertesting.com is behind Cloudflare bot protection (403 to WebFetch). No direct download URL — App Store only.
